name: Central Propane - Hazel Green
notes: Single confirmed location in Hazel Green, AL. Company website central-propane.com lists a 'Locations' page but search results only surfaced the Hazel Green address. Serves northeast Alabama.

name: Penn-Jersey Propane Gas Co
notes: Two NJ locations found (Hainesport and Medford). Serves South Jersey and greater Philadelphia area.

name: Eagle Energy Corporation
notes: Single confirmed Sparks, NV location. Serves Reno/Sparks and parts of California. Small local operator.

name: Dooley's Petroleum Inc.
notes: Multi-location MN/Upper Midwest operator with significantly more branches than estimated. At least 6-7 confirmed Minnesota locations. Company does have a website (dooleypetro.com) despite being flagged as no-website.

name: Rocky Mountain LP Gas
notes: Two CO locations (Westcliffe, Walsenburg). Serving Colorado since 1964.

name: TWIN RIVERS PROPANE
notes: Single GA location (Cornelia/Baldwin area). Note: Twin Rivers Propane appears to be affiliated with or acquired by United Propane Gas (UPG) per FuelWonk listing. May no longer be an independent entity.

name: G & L Distributing
notes: Single Delta, UT location. Small single-location operator; contact Garth Lake. Listed in Utah State Fire Marshal LP gas licensees.

name: Grill Gas Express
notes: Not a traditional propane dealer with a physical storefront. Grill Gas Express is a propane tank exchange/delivery service (Blue Rhino/Amerigas cylinders) primarily operating in Tennessee (Memphis area), Mississippi, and Florida. No Alabama location confirmed. Original state hint of AL appears incorrect. Likely should be removed from SE propane market map or reclassified as a tank exchange service rather than a propane distributor.

name: Superior Propane
notes: Single Williams, AZ location. Serves Flagstaff, Prescott, Grand Canyon, Winslow, Sedona areas. 60+ years in business.

name: Pro Gas Propane
notes: Could not confirm a distinct 'Pro Gas Propane' company in Georgia via web search. Results returned unrelated companies (GasPro/gowithgaspro.com in Grovetown, various other GA propane dealers). May be defunct, very small local operator with no web presence, or potentially conflated with GasPro (Grovetown, GA, (762) 994-0050, 110 A Harlem Grovetown Rd). Flagged for manual review.

name: Tri-County Gas
notes: Single FL location (Bonifay). In business since 1962. Serves Holmes, Washington, Jackson counties in FL panhandle.

name: R & D Propane
notes: Single Eugene, OR location (also noted as Florence, OR). Family-owned since 1982, serves Lane, Benton, Linn, Douglas counties. Company does have a website (rdpropane.com) despite being flagged as no-website.

name: TriCounty Gas
notes: Single WY location. Alt address cited: 3800 US Highway 14-16 E, Buffalo, WY. Serves Sheridan, Johnson, Campbell counties in northern Wyoming. Company does have a website (tricountygas.com).

name: Reed Oil
notes: Two NC locations confirmed (Manteo on Outer Banks and Hertford). 80+ years in business. Also referenced as Reed Gas Company.
